%%{Security_Encryption}
}}%%
gantt
    dateFormat  X
    title Prowiz ERP – Project Timeline 
    axisFormat  Week %U
    excludes    weekends
    todayMarker off
    %% section Project Phases
    %% Project Kickoff             :a1, 2023-10-01, 0d
    %% Requirements Gathering      :a2, after a1, 4w
    %% Design Phase                :a3, after a2, 4w

    section Core Platform
    ETL & Digitisation          :etl, 0, 12w
    ETL Completion              :milestone, after etl, 0d
    File Management             :file, after etl, 10w
    File Management Completion  :milestone, after file, 0d
    ERP Task Engine             :erp, after etl, 14w
    ERP Completion              :milestone, after erp, 0d
    Infra Layer                 :infra, 0, 14w
    Infra Completion            :milestone, after infra, 0d
    Observability Layer         :obs, after infra, 10w
    Observability Completion    :milestone, after obs, 0d
    Storage Layer               :storage, 0, 14w
    Storage Completion          :milestone, after storage, 0d

    section AI Agent Layer (Security_IntrusionDetection)
    Email Agent                 :email, 0, 10w
    Doc Agent                   :doc, 0, 10w
    Compliance Agent            :compliance, 0, 10w
    Doc Generation Agent        :docgen, after doc, 14w
    Interaction Agent           :task, after doc, 10w
    Reporting Agent             :reporting, after doc, 10w
    Diagram Agent               :diagram, after task, 18w

    section UI & QA
    UI Layer                    :ui, 0, 20w
    Final Integration           :fi, after ui, 16w
    QA                          :qa, after etl, 16w
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Prowiz ERP项目制定一个完整的甘特图，时间跨度大概一年半。核心平台层是最重的部分，我想把ETL和数字化放在最前面，它和基础设施层、存储层要并行启动。
明白，ETL作为前置任务，持续12周。那File Management是在ETL完成后才开始吗？还有Observability Layer，我理解是要等基础设施搭好之后再接入？
对的，File Management依赖ETL完成，Observability要等Infra Layer稳定后再上。另外ERP任务引擎也是跟ETL并行但更长，要14周。每个主要模块结束时我希望有里程碑标记。
好的，Core Platform部分已更新：ETL 12周，File Management接后10周，ERP 14周，Infra和Storage都是14周从头跑，Observability接Infra后10周。五个里程碑也都加上了。
接下来是AI Agent层，这里有个特殊模块叫Security_IntrusionDetection。Email Agent、Doc Agent、Compliance Agent这三个可以立刻启动，各10周。但Doc Generation Agent必须等Doc Agent做完，Interaction Agent和Reporting Agent也是。
Interaction Agent和Reporting Agent都是after doc，但Doc Generation要14周，Diagram Agent又依赖Interaction Agent，需要18周——这个路径是最长的，我理解对吗？
没错，Diagram Agent是AI层里周期最长的。最后UI & QA部分，UI Layer要贯穿前20周，Final Integration在UI之后做16周，QA则从ETL完成后就开始，持续16周。
全部确认。AI Agent层六个任务已排好，UI 20周，Final Integration接UI后16周，QA接ETL后16周。整个时间轴用周数显示，隐藏today标记，排除周末。
